summary: Iteration 36 - UI Improvements Testing for GPS Tracking and Reservations pages. All requested UI changes verified successfully: 4-column grid on GPS tracking, increased font sizes for status badges and inline buttons on reservations page.

GPS Tracking 4-Column Grid.details: Vehicles displayed in 4-column card grid layout (width: 23.5% = ~444px per card). 27 vehicles visible with 4 cards per row. Stats row shows En route/Stationnés/Hors ligne counts.

Reservations Planning View - Status Badg.details: Status badges (Confirmée, En attente, Active, Espèces) have fontSize: 11px as required. Gantt chart inline status labels also visible with fontSize: 11px.

Reservations Planning View - Inline Butt.details: Inline status change buttons (Confi, Activ, Termi, Annul) have fontSize: 9px as required. Buttons are readable and functional.

Reservations Planning View - 4-Column Ca.details: 'Reservations du mois' section shows 15 cards in 4-column grid layout (width: 23.5% = 443.7px per card).

Reservations List View - Status Badges.details: Status badges (Confirmée, Active, Terminée, Annulée, En attente, Espèces) have fontSize: 13px and fontWeight: 700-800 as required.

Reservations List View - Inline Buttons.details: Inline status change buttons (Confi, Activ, Termi, Annul) have fontSize: 10px and fontWeight: 700 as required.

Reservations List View - 4-Column Grid.details: List view displays reservation cards in 4-column grid using numColumns={4}. Cards show client name, vehicle, dates, price, payment status, and inline status buttons.

View Toggle (Planning ↔ Liste).details: Toggle buttons work correctly. Planning view shows Gantt chart with month navigation. Liste view shows filter tabs and card grid.

screenshots: 02_tracking_page.png - GPS Tracking page with 4-column vehicle grid
03_reservations_planning.png - Planning view with Gantt chart and 4-column cards
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - 27 GPS trackers, 15+ reservations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI improvements from iteration 36 are working correctly. GPS Tracking shows 4-column grid (width: 23.5%). Reservations Planning view has status badges at 11px and inline buttons at 9px. Reservations List view has status badges at 13px and inline buttons at 10px, with 4-column card grid using numColumns={4}.
